headline: Citi Returns to Prologis (PLD) with Buy Rating and $145 Target
summary: Prologis, Inc. (NYSE:PLD) is included among the 13 Best REIT Dividend Stocks to Invest in. On March 6, Citi resumed coverage of Prologis, Inc. (NYSE:PLD) with a Buy rating. The firm set a $145 price target after a period during which its rating had been suspended. In late February, Janus Henderson portfolio manager Greg Kuhl […]
